title: Meal Builder for Restaurant
description:
Create a Builder for a restaurant Meal ordering system:
- Meal has: bun, pattyCount, cheese, sauce, size, price
- MealBuilder with fluent setters returning 'this'
- build() validates: bun required, pattyCount >= 1, price > 0
- Meal is immutable after construction (private constructor)
- Demo: build a custom burger and a simple meal, print details
hints: Meal constructor is private -- only Builder can create it
Each setter returns 'this' (the Builder) for method chaining
build() is the single validation gate -- check all invariants there

title: Notification Builder with Channel Validation
description:
Create a Builder for a notification system with channel-specific rules:
- Notification has: channel (EMAIL/SMS/PUSH), recipient, subject, body, priority, attachments count
- Builder validates channel-specific rules in build():
  - EMAIL requires subject and recipient containing '@'
  - SMS requires body <= 160 chars and recipient with digits only
  - PUSH requires priority (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW)
- Fluent API with method chaining
- Demo: build valid notifications for each channel and one invalid case
hints: Channel-specific validation belongs in build(), not in individual setters
Use switch/when on channel to apply the right validation rules
The Builder pattern shines here because different channels need different fields

title: Payment Request Builder with Conditional Fields
description:
Design a PaymentRequest builder where required fields depend on the payment method:
- PaymentRequest has: amount, currency, method (CREDIT_CARD/UPI/BANK_TRANSFER), plus method-specific fields
- CREDIT_CARD requires: cardNumber (16 digits), expiry (MM/YY), cvv (3 digits)
- UPI requires: vpa (must contain @)
- BANK_TRANSFER requires: accountNumber, ifscCode (format: 4 letters + 7 digits)
- Common validation: amount > 0, currency not empty
- Builder collects all fields; build() validates based on selected method
- Add a toSummary() that masks sensitive data (show last 4 of card, mask cvv)
- Demo all three payment methods and one validation failure
hints: All fields live in one builder -- method-specific validation happens in build()
Use regex for format validation: card number, IFSC code, VPA format
toSummary() should mask sensitive fields: card shows ****-****-****-1234, cvv shows ***
Consider: what happens if someone sets both cardNumber AND vpa? Validate mutual exclusivity?
